description_long: This coatrack features a rectangular wooden backplate with a slightly irregular, hand-crafted appearance, including visible wood grain and subtle notches. Three evenly spaced, metallic hooks are mounted on the front, each with a rounded base plate and a curved, double-pronged design for hanging coats, hats, or bags. The metal hooks have a matte, slightly worn finish, suggesting durability and frequent use. The back of the coatrack is plain wood, with no visible mounting hardware, while the sides reveal the thickness of the wooden board and the protrusion of the hooks. The overall design is utilitarian, with a rustic charm suitable for urban entryways, garages, or public spaces. There are no decorative elements, focusing on function and simplicity.
description: A rustic wooden coatrack with three sturdy metal hooks, designed for wall mounting and everyday use. The design is simple and functional, with a natural wood finish and no decorative embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wooden backplate and all three metal hooks clearly visible and evenly spaced.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden board and the outward projection of the three metal hooks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden backplate with no visible hooks or mounting hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the hooks and the board's thickness.
